2. breeding_back(heck_cattle,aurochs) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : (form_of_artificial_selection(X0) => artificially_selected(X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. ? [X0] : (X0 = heck_cattle & artificially_selected(X0)) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~? [X0] : (X0 = heck_cattle & artificially_selected(X0)) [negated conjecture 6]
10. ! [X0,X1] : (form_of_artificial_selection(X0) | ~breeding_back(X0,X1)) [ennf transformation 1]
11. ! [X0] : (artificially_selected(X0) | ~form_of_artificial_selection(X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
12. ! [X0] : (heck_cattle != X0 | ~artificially_selected(X0)) [ennf transformation 7]
13. ~breeding_back(X0,X1) | form_of_artificial_selection(X0) [cnf transformation 10]
14. breeding_back(heck_cattle,aurochs) [cnf transformation 2]
15. ~form_of_artificial_selection(X0) | artificially_selected(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
16. heck_cattle != X0 | ~artificially_selected(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
17. ~artificially_selected(heck_cattle) [equality resolution 16]
18. form_of_artificial_selection(heck_cattle) [resolution 13,14]
19. artificially_selected(heck_cattle) [resolution 18,15]
20. $false [forward subsumption resolution 19,17]
